summary: Add Action Modal Feature Testing Complete - All features working. Dark-themed modal with glass-morphism backdrop, real pod members in dropdown, current user pre-selected, due date auto-filled (3 days), category chips suggest titles, actions create successfully with in-app notifications. Backend 8/8 tests passed, Frontend UI fully functional.
seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed actions created and completed during backend API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Add Action Modal fully tested on /support-pods/athlete_3. Key data-testid selectors: add-action-btn (opens modal), add-action-modal, add-action-overlay, add-action-title, add-action-assignee, add-action-due, add-action-notes, add-action-submit, add-action-close, cat-chip-{category_id} for category chips. Complete action buttons: complete-action-{action_id}. Reassign buttons: reassign-{action_id}. Show more toggle: show-all-actions. Next Actions section: next-actions.

test_classes: TestAddActionModalEndpoints - GET support pod has pod_members, POST create action with all/minimal fields, PATCH complete/reassign action, verify action shows in pod, notification created
TestCleanup - Clean up TEST_ prefixed actions

add_action_modal_opens.details: Clicking '+ Add' button opens dark-themed modal with glass-morphism backdrop

dark_theme_styling.details: Modal has dark background (#161b25), teal accents (rgba(46,196,182,*)), blur backdrop

assignee_dropdown_real_pod_members.details: Dropdown contains: Coach Williams (You), Coach Martinez (Club Coach), Chen Family (Parent/Guardian), Emma Chen (Athlete)

current_user_pre_selected.details: Coach Williams is pre-selected as assignee on modal open

due_date_prefilled.details: Due date auto-filled with 2026-03-15 (3 days from today 2026-03-12)

category_chips_suggest_titles.details: Clicking 'Follow-up needed' auto-fills 'Follow up on last conversation', clicking 'Check-in' auto-fills 'Check in with athlete about progress'

create_action_submission.details: Form submits successfully, toast shows 'Action created - Assigned to [name]', modal closes, list refreshes

complete_action.details: Clicking circle check button completes action, shows 'Action completed' toast

reassign_action.details: Hovering shows reassign button, clicking shows filtered list of pod members (excludes current owner)

show_more_toggle.details: Toggle changes from 'Show N more actions' to 'Hide N more actions', expands/collapses remaining actions

completed_actions_section.details: Collapsible section showing '10 completed' at bottom of Next Actions

priority_coloring.details: Top 3 actions have colored backgrounds - #1 red (rgba(239,68,68)), #2 orange (rgba(245,158,11)), #3 blue (rgba(59,130,246))

api_verification.GET_support_pods_athlete_id: 200 OK - returns pod_members array with real members
api_verification.POST_support_pods_actions: 200 OK - creates action with all fields, triggers notification
api_verification.PATCH_support_pods_actions_complete: 200 OK - marks action completed with timestamp
